[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111111 a
1 1111111111 a
2 1110110111 8
3 1101111101 8
4 1110000011 5
5 1011111111 9
6 0111110011 7
7 1111111100 8

01 10 1111111110 9
12 21 1111111110 9
23 32 1101111101 8 match 3
34 43 1101001111 7
45 54 1001001111 6
56 65 0011101111 7
67 76 1111101100 7
70 07 1101011110 7

02 20 1101111110 8
13 31 1110110111 8 match 2
24 42 1101111111 9
35 53 1101000011 5
46 64 1011101111 8
57 75 1101000111 6
60 06 0011111110 7
71 17 1110110110 7

03 30 1101011011 7
14 41 1111111111 a match 0 1
25 52 1101111111 9
36 63 1111101101 8
47 74 1101001111 7
50 05 0001011011 5
61 16 1111111110 9
72 27 1101111100 7

04 40 1001011111 7
15 51 1111110111 9
26 62 1111111100 8 match 7
37 73 1100000101 4
